zh.lifeSummary: 當John Carter於1504年出生在英國賀特福爾利可曼斯沃斯時，他的母親Alice Ann Croxton42歲，父親Sir John William Nicholas de Carter29歲。他於1535年4月12日與Agness Jarne Newton在英國英格蘭賀特福爾沃特福德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1586年9月28日在他的家鄉享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Carter于1504年出生在英国賀特福爾利可曼斯沃斯时，他的母亲Alice Ann Croxton42岁，父亲Sir John William Nicholas de Carter29岁。他于1535年4月12日与Agness Jarne Newton在英国英格兰賀特福爾沃特福德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1586年9月28日在他的家乡享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Carter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a transporter of goods, from Middle English carter(e) ‘carter’ (Anglo-Norman French car(e)tier, Old French charetier, medieval Latin carettarius, carettator). The Old French word coalesced with the earlier Middle English word cart(e) ‘cart’, which is from either Old Norse kartr or Old English cræt, both of which, like the Late Latin word, were probably derived from Celtic. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Charman
meanings: English (Sussex and Surrey): occupational name for a carter, carrier, or coachman, from Middle English (Old French) char, car ‘car, cart, carriage’ + Middle English man ‘man’. Compare Carter and Carman 2.

English (Sussex and Surrey): occupational name for someone who did odd jobs, from Middle English char(re), chere (Old English cier(r), cer(r), cear(r), cær(r)) ‘turn (of activity), small job, chore’ + man. Compare Carman 2.
In some cases probably also an Americanized form of Slovenian Čarman (see Carman 5).

variants.name: Chartier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Normand, Jacques, Marcel, Adelard, Alcide, Emile, Gilles, Raoul, Rosaire, Alphonse.
French: shortened form of charretier, an occupational name for a carter, from an agent derivative of Old French charette ‘cart’.
French Canadian: altered form of English   Carter  , a cognate of 1 above. Compare   Sharkey   and   Shorkey  .

variants.name: Karter
meanings: German: occupational name for a carder (someone who prepares wool for spinning), from Middle High German karter. Compare Carter .

variants.name: McCarter
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   McArthur  .

variants.name: Carrier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Lucien, Cecile, Alain, Gaetan, Gilles, Jacques, Laurent, Normand.

English and southern French: from Middle English, Old French car(r)ier (from Late Latin carrarius, a derivative of carrum ‘cart, wagon’, a word of Gaulish origin), an occupational name for a carter (see Carter ), in French also for a cartwright. Compare French Charrier .
French: occupational name for a stonemason or quarryman, carrier. Compare Coyer .

variants.name: Cartman
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): occupational name from Middle English cartman ‘man who operated a cart for the transport of goods’. Compare Carter .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Carter was born in 1504, in Rickmansworth, Hertfordshire, England, his mother, Alice Ann Croxton, was 42 and his father, Sir John William Nicholas de Carter, was 29. He married Agness Jarne Newton on 12 April 1535, in Watford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 28 September 1586, in his hometown, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Carter est né en 1504, à Rickmansworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, sa mère, Alice Ann Croxton, avait 42 ans et son père, Sir John William Nicholas de Carter, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Agness Jarne Newton le 12 avril 1535, à Watford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 septembre 1586, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Carter 1504 in Rickmansworth, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war seine Mutter Alice Ann Croxton 42 und sein Vater Sir John William Nicholas de Carter 29. Er hat am 12. April 1535 in Watford, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Agness Jarne Newton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. September 1586 im Alter von 82 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Carter è nato il nel 1504 nel Rickmansworth, Hertfordshire, England, il suo madre, Alice Ann Croxton, aveva 42 anni e il suo padre, Sir John William Nicholas de Carter, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Agness Jarne Newton il 12 aprile 1535, nel Watford, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 28 settembre 1586, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Carterが1504年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアリクマンスウオルスで生まれた時，母Alice Ann Croxtonは42歳，父Sir John William Nicholas de Carterは29歳であった。1535年4月12日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワトフォードでAgness Jarne Newtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1586年9月28日に故郷で82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Carter(이)가 1504년 영국 허트퍼드실르 릭먼스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 어머니 Alice Ann Croxton(은)는 42세였고, 그의 아버지 Sir John William Nicholas de Carter(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1535년 4월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓퍼드에서 Agness Jarne Newton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1586년 9월 28일 그의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Carter nasceu em 1504, em Rickmansworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, sua mãe, Alice Ann Croxton, tinha 42 anos e seu pai, Sir John William Nicholas de Carter, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Agness Jarne Newton em 12 de abril de 1535, em Watford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de setembro de 1586, em sua cidade natal, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Carter родился в 1504 г. в местности риккмансворт, хиртфордшир, Англия, его матери по имени Alice Ann Croxton было 42 года, а отцу, которого звали Sir John William Nicholas de Carter, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Agness Jarne Newton 12 апреля 1535 г. в местности ватфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 28 сентября 1586 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Carter nació en 1504, en Rickmansworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su mamá, Alice Ann Croxton, tenía 42 años y su papá, Sir John William Nicholas de Carter, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Agness Jarne Newton el 12 de abril de 1535, en Watford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 28 de septiembre de 1586, en su pueblo, a la edad de 82 años.
